description_long: This is a compact, rectangular chest of drawers with a smooth, light-colored finish, likely painted or laminated wood. The front features two drawers, each adorned with a decorative, gold-toned handle and bordered by a carved rectangular pattern, adding a touch of elegance. The top surface is flat with gently rounded front corners, suitable for placing small items. The sides and back are plain, with no visible embellishments or hardware. The base has a subtle curved cutout at the front, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. This piece is typical of bedroom or living room furniture but could also be found in urban settings such as lobbies, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A small, light-colored chest of drawers with two ornate handles and carved front panels, featuring a flat top and subtle decorative details.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat surface with no visible hardware or decoration.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a smooth, unadorned panel and the rounded front edge of the top surface.
description_view_2: The front view displays two drawers with gold-toned handles and decorative carved patterns, as well as a curved base cutout.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain panel and the rounded front edge of the top.
